summary: Backend API testing for Music API integration, Profile Gallery updates, Posts creation, and Auth API. All features working correctly. Music API returns fallback tracks (MOCKED - Jamendo not configured).
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user (test-user@test.com). Test data cleaned up after each test via fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All specified APIs tested and working: Music API (GET /api/music/featured, GET /api/music/search, GET /api/music/genres, GET /api/music/moods), Auth API (GET /api/auth/me with gallery_items field), Posts API (POST /api/posts for text posts), Gallery API (POST /api/profiles/gallery for image URL updates). Music API uses MOCKED fallback tracks from soundhelix.com since JAMENDO_CLIENT_ID is not configured.

backend.GET_music_featured: PASS - Returns fallback tracks (MOCKED - Jamendo not configured)
backend.GET_music_search: PASS - Returns fallback tracks with pagination
backend.POST_auth_login: PASS - Returns user with gallery_items field
backend.GET_auth_me: PASS - Returns user with gallery_items, gallery_images, video_items fields

mocked_apis_list: Music API uses fallback tracks from soundhelix.com when JAMENDO_CLIENT_ID is not configured
